name: auto-term
description: mac terminal app with llm autocomplete

scripts.package: npm run build && electron-rebuild && electron-packager . auto-term --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --overwrite --out=release --asar.unpack="**/node_modules/node-pty/**" && cp build/icon.icns release/auto-term-darwin-arm64/auto-term.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns && /usr/bin/touch release/auto-term-darwin-arm64/auto-term.app
